name: Accuracy Shipping Limited
summary: Accuracy Shipping Limited provides third party logistics solutions worldwide. The company offers logistics services, including transportation, distribution, freight forwarding, clearing and forwarding, custom house clearance, warehousing, and other services. Its services include air cargo services, such as import customs, brokerage, insurance, consolidation, packing, and logistics; sea cargo services consisting of shipment tracking, purchase order management, and space protection; project cargo comprising freight management, cargo handling, and cargo movement; land cargo services; and custom broking services. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Anjar, India.
